title: Nursery Rhyme. DXXXIV. Natural History.
content:
Riddle me, riddle me, ree,
        A hawk sate upon a tree;
        And he says to himself, says he,
        Oh dear! what a fine bird I be.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DXXXIV. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
